profile.name: Mehdi Bentaleb
profile.aboutText: Specialized in building robust web applications using the Laravel ecosystem. I focus on backend architecture, MVC patterns, and Database optimization. My goal is to bridge the gap between complex logic and seamless user experiences, ensuring high performance and clean code standards.

projects.title: Market Store Management
projects.description: Professional retail management system for inventory control and automated reporting.
projects.fullDescription: A professional retail management system designed for inventory control, sales tracking, and automated reporting for local businesses. Built with a focus on performance and data integrity.

projects.title: Drive-Rent System
projects.description: Comprehensive platform for vehicle tracking and automated booking.
projects.fullDescription: A comprehensive car rental platform featuring real-time vehicle availability tracking, automated booking management, and a customer reservation portal.

projects.title: GymFitness Frontend
projects.description: High-performance landing page with smooth animations and BMI calculator.
projects.fullDescription: A high-performance, responsive landing page for a fitness club, featuring smooth scroll animations, a dynamic BMI calculator, and pricing plan layouts.

education.description: Deep dive into Backend architecture, MVC patterns, and Database optimization.
Advanced training in modern web frameworks and collaborative coding environments.

experience.description: Developing custom E-commerce platforms and SEO-optimized landing pages for local businesses using Laravel and Tailwind CSS.
Designed and developed an internal School Management System to automate student administration and internship tracking.

faqs.question: What is your core tech stack?
faqs.answer: My expertise lies in the Laravel ecosystem, including PHP, MySQL, and Tailwind CSS, while also working with React and Next.js for modern frontends.

faqs.question: Are you open to freelance projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, I am actively providing web development services for startups and local businesses in the Tangier region.
